Notice Of Motion And Motion To Comppel Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Julie Jardine for defendant and moving party Lyles Diversified, Inc.
TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE: Gerard J. Donnellan for plaintiff and opposing party Pacific Bell Telephone Company

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Lyles Diversified, Inc.'s motion to compel depositions is denied at this time as any order permitting the requested discovery will either prevent the case from going to trial or otherwise interfere with the trial calendar. The Court notes that while there was no specific date agreed to between the parties to complete the outstanding discovery, a request to continue the trial by defendant would be appropriate in light of the prior correspondence between the parties indicating a willingness to schedule the specified depositions until the most recent dispute. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
